promotions.headline: 30% off sitewide, stacks with SAMMYC
promotions.short_detail: Code SAMMYC adds extra savings, plus free 10ml BAC water on orders over $100
promotions.full_detail: Flawless Compounds is running 30% off sitewide, stackable with the SAMMYC discount. Orders over $100 also get a free 10ml BAC water while supplies last. Every new batch is 7X tested, including endotoxins, heavy metals, and sterility. Confirm final eligibility and stacking details directly on the vendor website.
